# Transcrição: How_to_STOP_Being_Ignored_&_Stand_Out_From_The_Crowd!_(#AskVinh_Ep_11)

- **Fonte:** How_to_STOP_Being_Ignored_&_Stand_Out_From_The_Crowd!_(#AskVinh_Ep_11)
- **Duração:** 08:02
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 03:00]

I'm always invisible in a crowd. What should I do to get more attention? This is to do with presence. And when you're talking about presence, there's two forms of presence. And the two forms of presence that exist, number one, vocal presence. So vocal presence, it's based on how you use your voice. And there are five key foundations on how you can use your voice. You've got rate of speech, you've got volume, you've got tonality, you've got pitch and melody, and you've got the pause. These are the critical foundations when it comes to how well you can use your voice. And depending on how well you use these five different areas of your voice, that's going to determine your level of vocal presence. And if you're not using rate of speech well, if you're not using volume well, you're not using pitch and melody well, you're not using your tonality well, you're not using the pause well, well then you have very minimal vocal presence. And I'll give you an example of that. So this is me with minimal vocal presence. Okay, here we go. In three, two, one. Hi, everyone. I just wanted to say hello and introduce myself. My name's Finn. I've been teaching communication skills now for the last 15 years and it's something that I'm very passionate about. Not trying to take the piss, but rather just trying to give you an example of what it looks like when I, or what it sounds like when I have low levels of vocal presence. How else can you appear visible? Well, the second thing is visual presence. And visual presence has to do with your body language and the way you dress. If you want to stand out a little more, you can dress a little louder. I usually dress pretty conservatively when I'm teaching because I don't want my clothing to distract from the message. But me and my personal life, I like to dress a little more loud. I enjoy it. My wife loves buying me some really fun clothes and she loves doing it. And I had the beginning when I first met her. I was like, I can't wear that shirt. That's too loud. What? You're going to wear a bright red shirt? No way. And I just wouldn't wear it. And I was like, I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it. And I'm going to wear it.
